---
title: "Theme, Immersion & Sensory Environment"
aliases: []
family: "Space, Props & Materiality"
media: []
facets:
  effects: []
  problems: []
  components: []
  genre: []
provenance: ""
---

## Referenced by

- [Search, Observation & Lateral Thinking](../puzzles-clues-information/search-observation-and-lateral-thinking.qmd)
